posts.author: PixelPioneer
posts.text: Just finished my first pottery wheel class! The clay is drying nicely and I'm super proud of the vase shape. Can't wait to try glazing next week.
posts.explanation: This post describes a harmless personal achievement in a hobby (pottery) with no policy violations. It falls under approved lifestyle content as it is benign and does not require escalation.
